retrieved_result: The Truth About Masculine and Feminine Energy - Part One This Shift in consciousness is deep. It is fundamental and it is happening from the inside out. It is changing how you think, how you perceive and what you believe. It will alter your perception of the world around you and, more importantly, it will change your relationship to absolutely everything
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses masculine/feminine energy and consciousness, not DIY room decoration ideas.
